$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.2 — patch: Remote Access now pre-checks the NET_ADMIN capability at page load and shows a copy-paste setup card (complete Portainer stack, CLI override, or plain-language explainer) instead of an Enable button that fails with a raw kernel error. Enable appears automatically once the container is recreated with the capability. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
